project.prompt: Build a small commercial landing page app for a fictional product called AtlasCRM. It needs a hero section, pricing cards, testimonials, FAQ, contact form UI, and a launch-readiness checklist. Generate real app files and validation evidence.

failures.message: npm run api:start exited with code 1 and logged {"event":"startup_env_error","missing":["ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"]}.
failures.likelyCause: The orchestrator bootstrap requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY before starting; no Anthropic key is present in this environment.
failures.recommendedFix: Provide a real ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and configure a real executor path before rerunning full build proof. Do not use the mock executor or static seeded artifacts as production proof.

failures.message: SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY are missing, so durable repository and queue mode are unavailable.
failures.likelyCause: No Supabase credentials were provided in the proof environment.
failures.recommendedFix: Provision Supabase URL/service-role credentials, set PROJECT_REPOSITORY_MODE=durable and QUEUE_BACKEND=supabase, then rerun restart/resume proof.

failures.message: API_AUTH_TOKEN and OIDC issuer/client settings are missing, so auth mode resolves to disabled in development mode.
failures.likelyCause: No bearer token or OIDC configuration was provided in the proof environment.
failures.recommendedFix: Set API_AUTH_TOKEN for local proof or OIDC_ISSUER_URL/OIDC_CLIENT_ID/OIDC_AUDIENCE for OIDC proof before exercising protected build routes.

launchImplication: Blocked locally: the Codex task shell cannot access GitHub repository secrets unless they are explicitly injected, so this local proof still cannot create a fresh project with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. GitHub Actions now has a manual Full Build Path Proof workflow that safely maps ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and OPENAI_API_KEY from repository secrets, runs baseline checks, starts the API, creates a fresh AtlasCRM project, runs compile/plan, and fails visibly if persisted packet checks do not pass; live workflow results must still be reviewed before any pass/launch claim.
